summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the Careers section. Most features are working correctly including section intro, role cards display, Why Join Us section, culture marquee, and mobile responsiveness. Found minor issues with card expansion/collapse state management.

ui_bugs.issue: Inconsistent card expansion behavior - some cards (card 1) fail to expand properly, and some cards (0, 2) don't collapse when clicked again

passed_tests: Section intro with 'Build the Future With Us' heading displays correctly
All 6 role cards display in 2-column grid on desktop
Tag chips display correctly on all role cards (AI/ML, Python, LLMs, etc.)
Why Join Us section shows 4 feature cards with proper icons
Culture marquee scrolls continuously with correct phrases
CTA button 'Explore Open Roles' is visible and clickable
All required data-testid attributes are present
Apply Now buttons appear when cards are expanded
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix card expansion/collapse state management in RoleCard component. The handleToggle function may have timing issues or state conflicts causing inconsistent behavior.
